items.title: Grammarly is using our identities without permission
items.summary: Grammarly's "expert review" feature offers to give users writing advice "inspired by" subject matter experts, including recently-deceased professors, as Wired reported on Wednesday. items.title: Key research and product announcements at the AI Native Conf

items.title: FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling
items.summary: As GPU throughput outpaces memory bandwidth, kernels must evolve. We introduce FlashAttention-4, featuring new pipelining for maximum overlap, 2-CTA MMA modes to reduce shared memory traffic, and a hardware-software hybrid approach to softmax exponentials.

items.title: Cache-aware prefill–decode disaggregation (CPD) for up to 40% faster long-context LLM serving
